stimulus:
Instructions

In this experiment you will watch a series of short videos that gradually progress from static toward one of two letters, either an S or an X.

Your task is to identify which letter the video is progressing towards and press the corresponding key as quickly as possible.

Faster correct responses improve your performance score; performance influences your odds to win a raffle for an Amazon gift card.

Press space to continue.

user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
stimulus:
Practice Examples

As a reminder: you will watch a series of short videos that gradually progress from static toward one of two letters, either an S or an X.

Your task is to identify which letter the video is progressing towards and press the corresponding key as quickly as possible.

Faster correct responses improve your performance score; performance influences your odds to win a raffle for an Amazon gift card.

You will now complete 10 practice trials so you can get used to the task.

Press k to begin the practice trials.

stimulus:
Main Task

You will now begin the main portion of the task.

As a reminder: you will watch a series of short videos that gradually progress from static toward one of two letters, either an S or an X. Your task is to identify which letter the video is progressing towards and press the corresponding key as quickly as possible.

The main task consists of two blocks of trials with a short break between them.

Faster correct responses improve your performance score; performance influences your odds to win a raffle for an Amazon gift card.

Press k to begin.
